name: pitty-pi-ui
description: PiTTy: a fast, extensible OpenTUI frontend for the Pi coding agent

scripts.test:unit: bun test --conditions=browser test/prompt-history.test.ts test/conversation.test.ts test/diagnostics.test.ts test/message-window.test.ts test/pi-command.test.ts test/rpc.test.ts test/subagents.test.ts test/integrations.test.ts test/installers.test.ts test/sessions.test.ts test/update.test.ts test/upgrade.test.ts test/upgrade-fixture.test.ts test/install-fixture.test.ts test/install-powershell-fixture.test.ts test/logo.test.ts test/theme.test.ts test/settings.test.tsx test/mcp-config.test.ts test/render.test.tsx
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test:unit

author: Jirka Svítil
